name: Dreet-Lai
bio:
Physical Appearance: Argonian male with the characteristic scaled reptilian features of his race—including a lizard-like head, tail, and digitigrade legs. Wears a leveled light cuirass and boots (always of the best possible quality), with a 50% chance of also having gauntlets, greaves, or a helmet. Carries spare shirt and pants.
Race: Argonian
Personality Keywords: fugitive, fearful, wary, hostile
Role: Dreet-Lai is an Argonian assassin and a fugitive who resides in Bloodmayne Cave outside of Bravil. Fearful of being hauled back to prison, he spends his time prowling around the cave, ever-wary of trespassers.
Home Location Information: The second zone of Bloodmayne Cave, where he hides with fellow fugitive Enrion.
Daily Routine in the Cave: Dreet-Lai wanders the cave aimlessly with Enrion, presumably planning their next move. They rely on Hlofgar and Ashanta to guard the entrance of their hideout.
Equipment: Dreet-Lai is armed with a leveled bow and arrows (always of the best possible quality). He carries a small amount of gold.
author: Bethesda
